      "question": "What is a file in the context of a file system?",
      "options": [
        "A) A collection of data stored on a single disk block",
        "B) A pointer to a location in a disk block",
        "C) A structure containing metadata about a data file",
        "D) A method of data storage on a disk"
      ],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "A file is a structure containing metadata about a data file, including its name, location, size, and perm
